export default function ProfileHero({ profile, user, onOpenEditor }) { return (
{profile.initials}

Profile

{profile.title}

{profile.description}

Context Demo: {user.name} - {user.role}
{profile.skills.map((skill) => ( {skill} ))}

Overview

{profile.overviewTitle}

{profile.overviewText}
